def negative_pandas_full_dataframe_print_in_production():
    rule_id = "pandas_full_dataframe_print_in_production"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Full DataFrames are printed or displayed in production-oriented code paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
